title: Validate auto-commit suppression and commit-behavior isolation
description: Run focused automated coverage for RepositoryStorage write and deletion paths, including the explicit auto-commit tests, and confirm the new flag suppresses git subprocess work without regressing default behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Targeted tests cover _git_commit_bead and _git_commit_bead_deletion with _auto_commit disabled.
BeadAutoCommitTests still pass with real git commit behavior enabled inside their isolated setup.
Existing orchestrator/storage tests pass for the changed areas, and any timing improvement or remaining suite-runtime risk is recorded.
conflict_risks:
None — only storage.py was modified; no overlap with other in-progress beads expected.
None — single-file change in a method not touched by any sibling bead.
None — only tests/test_orchestrator.py was modified; no source files were changed.
